---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, a new data series, or a visualization
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do, and why? What's missing today?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or data series you'd like. If it's a new data source,
link it and note its license.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Scope
- [ ] Backend (endpoint / entity / seed)
- [ ] Frontend (UI / chart)
- [ ] Data pipeline
- [ ] Docs

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or anything else.
